categories.name: SET_SAVED_PLACE
categories.precondition: App is open at a state exposing a 'Saved place' shortcut (e.g., Home/Work)
abstract_steps: Open the saved-place editor for the target slot
Enter a query identifying the desired location
Select a matching result from suggestions or the map
Confirm to persist the saved place
failure_modes: Offline data set lacks the target POI
Query is too generic or misspelled
User exits editor before confirming, losing changes
Search returns history entries that are not real POIs
verification_checklist: After confirmation, the saved slot displays the chosen location name
Re-opening the slot shows the new address
Map shows a pin/icon for the saved place

categories.name: COMPUTE_ROUTE
categories.precondition: App is open with route/directions feature accessible
abstract_steps: Open route planner / navigation entry point
Dismiss any first-time legal/warning dialogs
Choose travel mode (drive/walk/transit/bike) if applicable
Set origin (current location or specific place)
Set destination via search, map tap, or shortcut
Apply route optimization options if requested
Initiate route calculation and read distance/time
failure_modes: Origin or destination cannot be found in available data
Selected travel mode unsupported in region/offline
Connectivity required but unavailable
Promotional banner obscures route inputs and agent loops scrolling
Previously cached destination triggers a confirm-replace dialog
Wrong transport mode left selected
Mistaking an unrelated bottom-sheet action for the start button
verification_checklist: Both endpoints visible in route panel
A route line is drawn on the map
Numeric distance and ETA are displayed
Travel mode indicator matches the intended mode
Selected transport mode highlighted
From/To fields reflect intended endpoints

categories.name: QUERY_NEAREST_POI
categories.precondition: App is open with search functionality and current/user location available
abstract_steps: Open search
Enter category keyword or tap category chip
Allow app to return ranked list by proximity
Pick top/nearest result
failure_modes: Map data offline and lacks POI category
Search term overly specific or misspelled
No internet for online POI lookups
User location not set, so distances cannot be ranked
verification_checklist: Results list shows at least one POI with distance
Nearest entry is highlighted or top of list
Selecting it reveals its details and map pin

categories.name: RECOVER_FROM_EMPTY_SEARCH
categories.precondition: A search has returned an empty result
abstract_steps: Clear the query field
Try a broader/simpler term or canonical name
If still empty, try a synonym or related category
If repeated failures, abandon and mark task infeasible
failure_modes: Repeatedly re-issuing the same query
Concatenating new text onto leftover text in field
Mistaking offline-data limitation for a typo
verification_checklist: Field is empty before retry
Each retry uses a meaningfully different term
Loop is bounded (e.g., max 3 retries) before declaring infeasible

categories.name: DISMISS_OVERLAY
categories.precondition: A modal overlay or settings panel is blocking the main view
abstract_steps: Use system back/navigate-back gesture
If back fails, look for explicit close affordance
Avoid tapping internal toggles thinking they dismiss the overlay
failure_modes: Tapping header items toggles internal state instead of closing
Repeatedly clicking same element with no effect
Confusing overlay with main screen
verification_checklist: Main map/content visible again
Overlay-specific widgets no longer present
Subsequent actions on main view succeed

categories.name: HANDLE_OFFLINE_STATE
categories.precondition: App reports no internet and required feature needs online data
abstract_steps: Attempt one retry of network action
If still offline, exit app or check device network settings
If device cannot be brought online, declare task infeasible
failure_modes: Looping on Retry without network change
Navigating to device settings but not toggling connectivity
Assuming offline maps cover online-only POIs
verification_checklist: Connectivity indicator shows online
Previously failing search/route now returns data
No 'No internet connection' banner visible

categories.name: TOGGLE_DISPLAY_OPTION
categories.precondition: App is open at its main content view
abstract_steps: Open the main settings or configuration menu
Navigate to the section that controls visible layers/overlays
Locate the desired option and toggle its switch ON
If a category/subtype picker opens, select required item(s) and confirm
failure_modes: Tapping the row opens a sub-screen instead of toggling
Selecting one item replaces another (single-select instead of multi-select)
Toggle reverts because no concrete selection was confirmed
verification_checklist: Toggle visually shows the ON state
Subtitle under the option reflects the chosen value
Returning to main view shows the new elements rendered

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: App is open and information section is reachable
abstract_steps: Open the main menu and navigate to the relevant information area
Drill down into the specific item or comparison view
Read the value or compare indicators
Report the answer in the required format
failure_modes: Looking in the wrong submenu (e.g., display settings instead of account/billing)
Misreading icons that distinguish tiers/categories
verification_checklist: The visible text matches the queried entity
Indicators next to the entity have been correctly mapped to labels

categories.name: SEARCH_AND_VIEW
categories.precondition: App is open at main content view
abstract_steps: Open the search interface
Choose the appropriate search mode (free text / category / address / coordinates)
Enter the query or pick the category
Expand search scope if no results returned
Select a result to view it
failure_modes: Default scope is too narrow and yields no results
Result row tap appears unresponsive when an overlay just dismissed
Auto-formatted numeric fields cause invalid input
verification_checklist: Result is highlighted on the main view
Detail panel shows the expected item name
For coordinates: pin sits at requested numeric position

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY_SETTING
abstract_steps: Open settings
Select the profile or scope the change should apply to
Drill to the specific category (general/units/region/appearance/widgets)
Change the value or toggle
Confirm scope (this profile vs all profiles) and save
failure_modes: Setting only applies to current profile when global was intended
Forgetting to confirm a selection dialog so change is not persisted
Editing the wrong profile because active profile was different
verification_checklist: Subtitle of the setting reflects the new value
If applicable, the change persists after navigating back

categories.name: ENABLE_FEATURE_MODULE
abstract_steps: Open the module/plugin list
Locate the desired module
Activate it via toggle or context menu 'Enable'
Acknowledge confirmation dialogs
failure_modes: Tapping description area opens detail instead of toggling
Confirmation dialog left undismissed causing apparent no-op
verification_checklist: Module indicator switches to active color/state
Any added profile/feature becomes available

categories.name: COPY_OR_SHARE_CONTENT
abstract_steps: Open the share menu for the selected item
Pick a copy/share variant that matches the request
Verify clipboard/share completion notice
failure_modes: Picking a copy variant that excludes required fields
Failing to long-press to surface the share menu
verification_checklist: Toast or system message confirms the action
Receiving target contains the expected data

categories.name: LAUNCH_APP
abstract_steps: Open the app drawer or use global search
Disambiguate icons that look similar to other apps
Tap the correct icon
Wait through splash screen until main UI is interactive
failure_modes: Confusing similarly colored/styled icons of other apps
Interacting before app finishes loading
verification_checklist: Main UI of the target app is visible and responsive

categories.name: COUNT_OR_INSPECT_LIST
categories.precondition: List/tab containing the items is reachable
abstract_steps: Navigate to the list/tab
Scroll to view all items if necessary
Count items or read the requested attribute
Return the value
failure_modes: Reporting before the list fully loads
Missing items because of pagination or hidden categories
verification_checklist: Reported count matches visible entries
Empty state correctly reported as 0/None
